nasb.text: So I said, ‘I have been expelled from Your sight. Nevertheless I will look again toward Your holy temple.’

esv.text: Then I said, ‘I am driven away from your sight; yet I shall again look upon your holy temple.’

cnv.text: 我說：‘我雖從你眼前被趕逐， 我仍要仰望你的聖殿。’

ccb.text: 我心想，你已经驱逐我离开你的面， 但我要再瞻仰你的圣殿。

csbs.text: 我说：‘我从你眼前被驱逐了； 我却要再次仰望你圣洁的殿！’
